title: Bellino

infobox.value: is a *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* (municipality) in the [Province of Cuneo](/wiki/Province_of_Cuneo "Province of Cuneo") in the [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") region [Piedmont](/wiki/Piedmont "Piedmont"), located about 80 kilometres (50 mi) southwest of [Turin](/wiki/Turin "Turin") and about 45 kilometres (28 mi) northwest of [Cuneo](/wiki/Cuneo "Cuneo"), on the border with France. It is located in the upper [Varaita Valley](/wiki/Varaita_Valley "Varaita Valley").
["Superficie di Comuni Province e Regioni italiane al 9 ottobre 2011"](https://www.istat.it/it/archivio/156224). Italian National Institute of Statistics. Retrieved 16 March 2019.
All demographics and other statistics: Italian statistical institute [Istat](/wiki/National_Institute_of_Statistics_(Italy) "National Institute of Statistics (Italy)").

**Bellino** is a *[comune](/wiki/Comune "Comune")* (municipality) in the [Province of Cuneo](/wiki/Province_of_Cuneo "Province of Cuneo") in the [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") region [Piedmont](/wiki/Piedmont "Piedmont"), located about 80 kilometres (50 mi) southwest of [Turin](/wiki/Turin "Turin") and about 45 kilometres (28 mi) northwest of [Cuneo](/wiki/Cuneo "Cuneo"), on the border with France. It is located in the upper [Varaita Valley](/wiki/Varaita_Valley "Varaita Valley").

Bellino borders the following municipalities: [Acceglio](/wiki/Acceglio "Acceglio"), [Casteldelfino](/wiki/Casteldelfino "Casteldelfino"), [Elva](/wiki/Elva,_Italy "Elva, Italy"), [Pontechianale](/wiki/Pontechianale "Pontechianale"), [Prazzo](/wiki/Prazzo "Prazzo"), and [Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye](/wiki/Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye "Saint-Paul-sur-Ubaye") (France). The [Pelvo d'Elva](/wiki/Pelvo_d%27Elva "Pelvo d'Elva") peak is located in the communal territory.
